changes: AuraNodeRenderer now uses original_tc4_1710 nodes.png through textures/original/thaumcraft4/misc/nodes.png plus original node_bubble.png.
Aura node core and wisps are camera-facing translucent billboards to better match TC4 TileNodeRenderer instead of block-like crossed planes only.
TC4RevealerHudAdapter now draws the original hud.png ring and side column for Goggles/Helmet/Thaumometer node HUD instead of a modern rectangular debug box.
Arcane Workbench screen now binds textures/gui/thaumcraft_core_original/gui_arcaneworkbench.png through OriginalGuiTextures.
Research Table screen removes the modern Bonus text label and renders table bonus aspects as original-style aspect icons on parchment.
Research Table combine slots now use original hex1/hex2 underlays and aspect icons instead of opaque modern square buttons.
Infusion Matrix now stores travellingComponentSource and consumes the travelling component only from the pedestal that emitted the source FX.
Infusion Matrix saves sourcePedestal / travelling source coordinates for runtime parity debugging and avoids duplicate-component pedestal drift.
known_not_complete: Research note is still a Forge screen adapter and not yet fully identical to original in-table manipulation.
Aura node renderer is closer but still must be compared against original TileNodeRenderer frame/strip math and all node modifiers.
Arcane Workbench still needs full slot-coordinate/craft-consume/research-gate comparison against ContainerArcaneWorkbench and ConfigRecipes.
Infusion Matrix craft exists and now drains/pulls/finishes, but not every TC4 instability event, special output path, and visual packet is fully exact yet.
Wand/staff/sceptre renderer and many item/block textures still need pass-by-pass original comparison.

realistic_remaining_estimate.percent_complete_estimate: about 40-45% of strict TC4 parity, not counting optional addons
realistic_remaining_estimate.major_stage_batches_remaining: roughly 30-45 batches of 20 stages if each batch keeps the current depth
realistic_remaining_estimate.reason: core registries, many recipes/research records, several systems and assets exist, but visual parity, full recipe/materialization coverage, exact GUIs, matrix instability/fx, wands, nodes, thaumonomicon pages, and many edge cases remain visibly incomplete.
